insforge.description: THORX split deployment — aligned with https://docs.insforge.dev (Introduction, Functions architecture, Deployments architecture, MCP deployment agent doc).

criticalModel.functionsRuntime: InsForge Edge Functions run in Deno (Deno Subhosting in cloud). They are invoked via slug (SDK insforge.functions.invoke or HTTPS). Timeout 30s, payload 10MB. Handlers use `export default async function(req: Request): Promise<Response>`.
criticalModel.thorxExpressBackend: This repo’s API is a bundled Node.js Express app (`npm run build` → `dist/index.js`). It is NOT a drop-in for the Functions tab. Hosting the full THORX API on Functions would require a major port to Deno or decomposing into many small functions.
recommendedSplit: Frontend: InsForge Deployment tab (Vercel-backed build). Default host is typically `https://{app-key}.insforge.site`. Custom domain `thorx.pro` must be wired per your InsForge / DNS / Vercel settings (Deployments docs note custom domains as evolving).
THORX REST API: Long-running Node process (VPS, container, or any host that can run `node dist/index.js` with Postgres + env). This matches the existing `replit.md` / cutover checklist model.
InsForge Functions: Use for new, bounded serverless tasks (webhooks, batch jobs, isolated integrations) — not as a 1:1 replacement for all of `server/routes.ts` without a dedicated migration project.

blankScreenChecklist: Deploy **built** output: `npm run build` must run; upload/serve `dist/public` (not raw `client/` with `/src/main.tsx` — that always yields a blank page on static hosting).
Set **build-time** `VITE_API_URL`, `VITE_INSFORGE_URL`, `VITE_INSFORGE_ANON_KEY` in the InsForge Deployment env panel so the bundle can reach API + auth.
Include root **`vercel.json`** (SPA fallback to index.html) so Wouter routes and refreshes work on the Vercel edge (per InsForge MCP deployment documentation).
If the app is served under a **subpath**, set Vite `base` accordingly; default `/assets/...` absolute paths break on subpaths.
Browser DevTools: check **Console** (uncaught errors) and **Network** (404 on `/assets/*.js` = wrong deploy root or missing files).

deploymentMcpNotes.createDeployment: Use InsForge MCP `create-deployment` with absolute `sourceDirectory`, pass `projectSettings.buildCommand` / `outputDirectory` if auto-detect fails. Example outputDirectory for this repo: `dist/public` when build runs from repository root.

firstFunctionSuggestion.purpose: Smoke-test Functions pipeline + CORS before any business logic migration.
firstFunctionSuggestion.handlerOutline: Deno default export; OPTIONS 204 with CORS headers; GET returns JSON { ok: true, service: 'thorx-health' }; use createClient with Deno.env INSFORGE_BASE_URL + ANON_KEY optional.
